columns.name: ActivityType
columns.description: The type of data sensitivity event: classification, labeling.

columns.name: AssetCreationTime
columns.description: Time (UTC) at which the asset was created.

columns.name: AssetLastScanTime
columns.description: Time (UTC) at which the asset was last scanned.

columns.name: AssetModifiedTime
columns.description: Time (UTC) at which the asset was last modified.

columns.name: AssetName
columns.description: Name of the asset scanned.

columns.name: AssetPath
columns.description: Path of the asset scanned in a source.

columns.name: AssetType
columns.description: Type of asset that was scanned: file, column, table, generic.

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: Classification
columns.description: Names of the classifications found.

columns.name: ClassificationDetails
columns.description: List of classification details: ID, name, count, uniquecount, confidence.

columns.name: ClassificationTrigger
columns.description: The trigger for the classification event.

columns.name: FileExtension
columns.description: File extension of the asset scanned. Only populated when asset type is a file.

columns.name: FileSize
columns.description: File size of the asset scanned in bytes. Only populated when asset type is a file.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: PurviewAccountName
columns.description: Name of the Purview account.

columns.name: PurviewRegion
columns.description: Region of the Purview account.

columns.name: PurviewTenantId
columns.description: Tenant ID associated with the Purview account.

columns.name: _ResourceId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the resource that the record is associated with

columns.name: SensitivityLabel
columns.description: Names for the labels found.

columns.name: SensitivityLabelDetails
columns.description: List of label details: ID, name, order.

columns.name: SensitivityLabelTrigger
columns.description: The trigger for the sensitivity label event.

columns.name: SourceCollectionName
columns.description: Name of the data source collection name in Purview.

columns.name: SourceName
columns.description: Name of the data source scanned as registered in Purview.

columns.name: SourcePath
columns.description: Resource Path of the data source. Ex: ARM path for Azure resources and ARN for AWS resources.

columns.name: SourceRegion
columns.description: The location of the data source that was scanned.

columns.name: SourceScanId
columns.description: The associated Purview scan ID for the source.

columns.name: SourceSubscriptionId
columns.description: Subscription ID associated with the data source. Account ID for AWS resources.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: SourceType
columns.description: Type of data source scanned: azuredatalakegen1, azureblob, azuredataexplorer, amazons3 etc.

columns.name: _SubscriptionId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the subscription that the record is associated with

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Time (UTC) when the log was generated.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table
